draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Mehta as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of product management in the gaming industry. I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Mehta during his tenure at Nibiru Games, where he progressed from Senior Product Manager to General Manager of Nibiru Poker, and I can attest to his remarkable talents and contributions.

As the Chief Product Officer at Nibiru Games, I have over 15 years of experience in product management and development within the gaming industry. I have held various leadership roles at Nibiru Games, including Senior Vice President of Games and Vice President of Games, where I oversaw the development and management of several of Nibiru's most successful titles, such as Wordplay, FarmTown, and Nibiru Poker. My extensive experience in the gaming industry has provided me with a deep understanding of the skills and expertise required to excel in this field.

Nibiru Games, founded in 2007, is a pioneering social game developer best known for hits like FarmTown, Wordplay, and Nibiru Poker. It became a leader in mobile and social gaming, leveraging platforms like Connectbook and later mobile ecosystems. In May 2022, Dynamic Play Interactive, a major video game publisher, acquired Nibiru Games for $12.7 billion, marking one of the largest deals in gaming history.

During his time at Nibiru Games, Mr. Mehta demonstrated an extraordinary ability to drive significant business growth and enhance user engagement through strategic vision and innovative product management. He joined the company in 2013 as a Senior Product Manager for Nibiru Poker, and quickly advanced through the ranks to become the Director of Product and eventually the General Manager of Nibiru Poker. In these roles, Mr. Mehta was responsible for the product vision and strategy, operations, and P&L for the $150M+ Nibiru Poker business across mobile and PC platforms.

Under Mr. Mehta's leadership, the Nibiru Poker franchise experienced a remarkable turnaround, reversing years of decline and achieving record-breaking performance. In 2016, Nibiru Poker recorded its highest quarterly mobile performance in the franchise's history, and in 2017, the game grew by 78% year-over-year. This impressive growth was driven by Mr. Mehta's ability to identify and execute on key product initiatives, such as the introduction of new features, improvements to the user experience, and the implementation of effective live operations strategies.

Mr. Mehta's impact at Nibiru Games extended beyond financial performance. He played a crucial role in shaping the company's product management culture and best practices. He mentored a new generation of product managers, sharing his insights and expertise through bootcamps, one-on-one mentoring sessions, and fostering a thriving product management community within the company. His contributions were recognized with two of Nibiru's most prestigious awards: the "Spirit Award," given quarterly to just one of over 1,500 employees, and the "Gold Award in Product Management," awarded annually to a single product manager company-wide. These honors reflect Mr. Mehta's dedication to excellence and his influence within the organization.

Beyond his achievements at Nibiru Games, Mr. Mehta has continued to demonstrate his extraordinary abilities in the gaming industry. As a founding partner and Chief Product Officer at Colossal Realm, he has overseen the company's growth into a key player in the gaming market, with over 20 million downloads in the past year and 5 million monthly active players. He played a pivotal role in the acquisitions of PlayFusion (valued at $80M+) and Game Corner ($5M+), while managing IP partnerships with major studios such as Starcast Studios and Paramount Pictures. His leadership and vision have been instrumental in ensuring the creation of innovative and engaging gaming experiences that captivate players globally.

Mr. Mehta's expertise in the gaming industry has also led to collaborations with prominent venture capital firms. He has helped identify startups for Crescendo Capital to invest in and has advised startups within their portfolio. His insights and experience have been invaluable to emerging gaming companies, and he has been invited to serve as a mentor for Crescendo's Speedrun program.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Mehta is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of product management in the gaming industry. His remarkable track record of driving business growth, enhancing user engagement, and shaping product management culture at Nibiru Games, combined with his continued success and influence at Colossal Realm and within the broader gaming community, make him a truly exceptional talent. I have no doubt that Mr. Mehta will continue to make significant contributions to the gaming industry and I wholeheartedly recommend him for any opportunity that recognizes and supports individuals of his extraordinary caliber.

Sincerely,

Alex Winthrop
Chief Product Officer
Nibiru Games Inc.
[email contact here]
final:
Dear USCIS,

I am thrilled to write this letter in support of Mr. Rohan Mehta, whom I regard as a standout talent in product management within the video gaming industry. Having worked alongside Mr. Mehta at Nibiru Games, I can personally attest to his exceptional abilities and remarkable achievements.

With over 15 years of experience in product management and development in the gaming industry, I have served in various leadership roles at Nibiru Games, including Chief Product Officer, Senior Vice President of Games, and Vice President of Games. My responsibilities included overseeing the development and management of some of Nibiru's most successful titles, such as Wordplay, FarmTown, and Nibiru Poker. This extensive experience has given me a profound understanding of the skills required to excel in this field.

Nibiru Games, founded in 2007, is a pioneering developer of social games, known for hits like FarmTown, Wordplay, and Nibiru Poker. It established itself as a leader in mobile and social gaming by leveraging platforms like Connectbook and later mobile ecosystems. In May 2022, Nibiru Games was acquired by Dynamic Play Interactive for $12.7 billion, marking one of the largest deals in gaming history.

During his tenure at Nibiru Games, Mr. Mehta exhibited an unparalleled ability to drive business growth and boost user engagement through strategic vision and innovative product management. Starting as a Senior Product Manager for Nibiru Poker, he quickly rose to the roles of Director of Product and then General Manager. In these roles, Mr. Mehta was responsible for crafting the product vision and strategy, overseeing operations, and handling P&L for the $150M+ Nibiru Poker business across mobile and PC platforms. Under Mr. Mehta's leadership, the Nibiru Poker franchise underwent a significant transformation, achieving record-breaking performance after years of decline. By 2016, Nibiru Poker hit its highest quarterly mobile performance in history, and in 2017, the game grew by 78% year-over-year. This impressive growth stemmed from Mr. Mehta's ability to identify and implement key product initiatives, such as introducing new features, enhancing user experience, and executing effective live operations strategies. Moreover, Mr. Mehta's contributions extended beyond financial success. He played a crucial role in shaping Nibiru's product management culture and best practices. He mentored emerging product managers through bootcamps, one-on-one mentoring sessions, and fostered a vibrant product management community within the company.

His contributions were recognized with two of Nibiru's most prestigious awards: the "Spirit Award" and the "Gold Award in Product Management." The Spirit Award is given quarterly to just one of over 1,500 employees, highlighting individuals who embody Nibiru’s core values such as teamwork, innovation, and a player-first mindset. This award honors those who foster a collaborative work environment, drive creative solutions, and significantly advance the company’s goals with their exceptional impact on processes, products, or culture.

The "Gold Award in Product Management," awarded annually to a single product manager company-wide, underscores a recipient's mastery of all product management pillars. It recognizes their willingness and capability to mentor and teach other product managers while delivering outstanding results. In 2019, Mr. Mehta received this accolade for his comprehensive expertise, dedication to nurturing upcoming talent, and substantial contributions to Nibiru’s success. These honors affirm his dedication to excellence and his influential role within the organization.

Beyond his accomplishments at Nibiru Games, Mr. Mehta has cemented his reputation as a formidable force in the video gaming industry. As a founding partner and Chief Product Officer at Colossal Realm, his influence has been pivotal in elevating the company to a significant position within the market. Under his strategic leadership, Colossal Realm achieved over 20 million downloads in the past year and garnered 5 million monthly active users. Mr. Mehta’s acute strategic insight was crucial in navigating the successful acquisitions of major entities such as PlayFusion and Game Corner, valued at over $80 million and $5 million respectively, which significantly expanded Colossal Realm’s portfolio and industry presence. His adept management of intellectual property partnerships with industry giants like Starcast Studios and Paramount Pictures highlights his exceptional ability to cultivate and sustain complex, high-impact relationships that foster unique and compelling gaming experiences for a global audience.

Moreover, Mr. Mehta’s leadership transcends mere strategic acquisitions and partnerships. He has been at the forefront of creating a culture of innovation and creativity at Colossal Realm, championing cutting-edge technology and prioritizing player-centric development. By guiding product development teams to explore and push the boundaries in game design and technology, he ensures that Colossal Realm continues to deliver immersive and engaging gaming experiences that captivate players worldwide. His role is crucial in setting the strategic trajectory of the company and maintaining its competitive edge in an ever-evolving industry. Mr. Mehta’s commitment to continuous improvement and innovation has driven Colossal Realm’s growth and fortified its reputation as a leader in offering groundbreaking and engaging gaming content.

In both Nibiru Games and Colossal Realm, Mr. Mehta has significantly impacted the field of product management within the video gaming industry. During his time at Nibiru Games, he spearheaded the revival of the Nibiru Poker franchise, setting a benchmark for data-driven and user-focused product management. By employing sophisticated data analytics to glean insights into player behavior and preferences, Mr. Mehta introduced targeted features and enhancements that resonated with users, boosting engagement and revenue. His approach exemplified the power of leveraging data to inform strategy and decision-making, becoming a model practice within Nibiru Games and across the industry. By actively incorporating player feedback into the development cycle, he ensured products remained aligned with user expectations, enabling Nibiru Games to stay ahead of market shifts and continuously deliver fresh, appealing content.

At Colossal Realm, Mr. Mehta continued to elevate product management by promoting a blend of creative exploration and analytical rigor. His forward-thinking approach embraced emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence to drive personalization and elevate user experiences, pushing the boundaries of gaming innovation. By weaving cutting-edge technological trends into the product development process, he enriched the player experience with tailored and immersive content. Mr. Mehta's leadership style fosters a culture of experimentation and collaboration among cross-functional teams, encouraging product managers to pursue innovative solutions that challenge the status quo. His mentorship has been instrumental in shaping next-generation leaders in the industry who are well-versed in balancing creativity with analytical precision. This holistic perspective reinforces Colossal Realm’s standing as a pioneer in the gaming sector and contributes to the broader evolution of video gaming as a dynamic and innovative field led by visionary product management.

Another example of Mr. Mehta's contributions to the field of product management is his involvement as a judge and mentor in platforms like Venture Scout with Crescendo Capital and his participation in DefinePR. As a Venture Scout at Crescendo Capital, one of the leading venture capital firms, Mr. Mehta leverages his extensive industry knowledge and insight into emerging trends to evaluate early-stage startups. His role involves identifying innovative companies with the potential to disrupt and advance the gaming sector, providing them with strategic advice and access to valuable networks. This position underscores his standing as a thought leader within the gaming industry, allowing him to influence the next wave of innovation by supporting entrepreneurs poised to redefine the industry landscape.

Similarly, through his involvement with DefinePR, Mr. Mehta extends his expertise to assist startups and established companies in navigating public relations and brand positioning complexities within the tech ecosystem. By working closely with creators and innovators, he helps them articulate compelling narratives that resonate with their target audiences, enhancing their visibility and market impact. This role exemplifies his commitment to nurturing talent and fostering growth across the industry, solidifying his reputation as a pivotal figure in product management dedicated to driving both individual and collective success in the video gaming and technology sectors.

Mr. Mehta's influence in product management for the video gaming industry is evident through his professional achievements and broader impact on the industry. His innovative approaches and strategic mindset have set new benchmarks for excellence in product development, design, and user engagement. By blending creative exploration with data-driven insights, Mr. Mehta consistently pushes the boundaries of what is possible in gaming, inspiring professionals and companies to rethink their strategies. His ability to mentor and guide the next generation of leaders further cements his role as an influential figure whose contributions continue to shape the evolving landscape of the video gaming industry. His visionary leadership fosters a culture of sustained innovation and success.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Mehta is an exceptional product management professional whose contributions have significantly advanced the video gaming industry. His roles at Nibiru Games and Colossal Realm have demonstrated his ability to drive business success through innovation, strategic thinking, and exceptional leadership. Beyond his corporate roles, his involvement in mentoring and advising through platforms like Crescendo Capital and DefinePR enhances his influence and underscores his dedication to nurturing talent and fostering innovation. Mr. Mehta is a leader in his field and an invaluable asset to the industry, continually pushing the boundaries of gaming through his relentless pursuit of excellence and dedication to influencing positive change across the sector. I wholeheartedly support his recognition as an extraordinary talent in product management.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need more details or further clarification.

Sincerely,

Alex Winthrop
Chief Product Officer
Nibiru Games Inc.
[email contact here]
